top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Fresh Iran war worries halt stock rally
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rise and markets fall after Netanyahu tells CNBC Israel and U.S. prepared to attack Iran again if necessary.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Bank, FCA and HM Treasury joint statement on Frontier AI models and cyber resilience
top_signals.summary: Statement from the Bank of England, Financial Conduct Authority and HM Treasury
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: FCA and Bank of England set out shared vision for tokenisation in UK wholesale markets
top_signals.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority and the Bank of England set out a shared vision and seek industry views on the future of UK wholesale markets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Market Participants Group meeting – 7 May 2026
top_signals.summary: The Market Participants Group (MPG) is a senior-level forum for financial market participants to share their views on relevant themes and narratives in financial markets with members of the Bank of England’s Monetary Policy Committee.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Logan: Fed May Need to Hike Interest Rates This Year to Confront Inflation - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Logan: Fed May Need to Hike Interest Rates This Year to Confront Inflation  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: PRA announces ring-fence change to reduce costs
top_signals.summary: The Prudential Regulation Authority has today announced plans to consult on reforming rules around shared operational services for ring-fenced banks.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Meeting of the Court of Directors held on 12 February 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank's Court of Directors acts as a unitary board, setting the organisation's strategy and budget and taking key decisions on resourcing and appointments. Required to meet a minimum seven times per year, it has five executive members from the Bank and up to nine non-executive members.

top_signals.title: Rupiah Hits 18,000 Level With Markets on Guard for Intervention
top_signals.summary: The Indonesian rupiah weakened to the psychological level of 18,000 per dollar, putting investors on watch for a stronger response from the central bank.

top_signals.title: FIFA bars fans from bringing water bottles into venues during World Cup
top_signals.summary: FIFA has banned fans from bringing refillable water bottles into World Cup venues in a last-minute policy change that will force thirsty supporters to pay for bottled water, The Athletic reported on Wednesday.
